Meet the Owner
HI, I'M HARRY

I run a small local landscaping business servicing the Northern Beaches. I take pride in providing reliable, honest, and quality service at a fair price.

Every job gets my personal attention. No subcontractors, no surprises — just great work and a property you'll be proud of.

Thank you for supporting a small local business.

Why Waterhouse
NOT JUST ANOTHER LANDSCAPER

Harry is on every job personally. No middlemen, no strangers — just consistent quality and accountability from start to finish.

Owner Operated
Harry handles every job personally — no subcontractors, no surprises.
Always Reliable
We show up when we say we will. Punctual and professional every time.
Fair Pricing
Honest quotes, no hidden costs. Quality work at a price that makes sense.
Local Knowledge
Northern Beaches born and bred — we know the soil, climate, and what works here.

What We Do
OUR SERVICES
01

Lawn Mowing

Regular mowing to keep your lawn sharp and healthy — edges included. Weekly, fortnightly, or one-off.

02

Hedging & Pruning

Clean, precise hedging and pruning that shapes your garden and keeps it looking its best year-round.

03

Weeding & Mulching

We clear the weeds and lay fresh mulch to suppress regrowth, retain moisture, and tidy up your beds.

04

Garden Clean-Ups

One-off or seasonal clean-ups to get your garden back under control — fast, thorough, and affordable.

05

Planting

Advice and installation of plants suited to your aspect, soil, and the Northern Beaches climate.

06

Green Waste Removal

We take it all away. No skips, no hassle — your garden waste gone and your property left spotless.
